title: Berghaus Arrow U30 Backpack — 30L, Light & Ergonomic
short_description: Versatile 30-litre backpack by Berghaus. The Arrow U30 in classic Jet Black offers ergonomic carrying comfort, recycled material and thoughtful organisation.
long_description: The Berghaus Arrow U30 is a versatile 30-litre daypack equally suited to the daily commute and short hikes. Padded shoulder straps, side mesh pockets, a hip-belt zip pocket and reflective details. Colour: Jet Black, Size: ONESZ.
features: Padded shoulder straps and sternum strap
buying_angle: Versatile 30L daypack for daily use and light hiking. Ergonomic, recycled material, classic black.
seo_title: Berghaus Arrow U30 Backpack Review 2026 | 30L Daypack
meta_description: Berghaus Arrow U30: 30L daypack in Jet Black, ONESZ, recycled, ergonomic.
alt_text: Berghaus Arrow U30 Backpack in Jet Black, 30 litre
